claim: Stress-tests the remaining Act-visible SDPI/shell-domination problem by iterating the exact interior KKT fixed-point map for shells 12 and 16. No violating attractor is found; all final ratios are <=1 within numerical tolerance.
claim_boundary: This is a numerical basin/uniqueness stress test, not a proof of global KKT uniqueness or global KL-SDPI. Some extreme starts converge to boundary-like non-equal attractors with ratio below 1; those are not violations and are covered by the boundary/indicator certificate route.
fixed_point_map: x_i^2 <- (24/w) P_q(i in B), with q(B) proportional prod_{i in B} x_i, RMS-normalized.
